channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: Five Agent Memory Types in LangGraph: A Deep Code Walkthrough (Part 2)
item.description: In Part-1 [https://dev.to/sreeni5018/the-5-types-of-ai-agent-memory-every-developer-needs-to-know-part-1-52fn] we covered the five memory types, why the LLM is stateless by design, and why memory...

item.title: Layered Context Routing for Campus Operations: A Facilities Intake PoC
item.description: How I Stacked Policy, Place, and Urgency Signals to Route Maintenance Requests TL;DR This write-up describes a personal experiment where I treat campus facilities intake as a context engineering...

item.title: Automating Landed Cost: The AI Advantage for ASEAN Sellers
item.description: For Southeast Asian cross-border sellers, profitability hinges on one unpredictable variable: the final landed cost. Manually calculating duties, taxes, and fees across ten different ASEAN markets...

item.title: Async Web Scraping in Python: httpx + asyncio for 10x Faster Data Collection
item.description: Async Web Scraping in Python: httpx + asyncio for 10x Faster Data Collection Synchronous scraping makes requests one at a time. While you wait for one response, you're doing nothing. Async...

item.title: Using GPT-4 and Claude to Extract Structured Data From Any Webpage in 2026
item.description: Using GPT-4 and Claude to Extract Structured Data From Any Webpage in 2026 Traditional web scraping breaks when sites change their HTML structure. LLM-based extraction doesn't — you describe what...

item.title: US-Israeli bombing destroys oldest medical research center in Iran
item.description: Article URL: https://www.egyptindependent.com/us-israeli-bombing-destroys-oldest-medical-research-center-in-iran-official-says/ Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47622776 Points:...

item.title: Arquitetura Zero Cost: Como transformei o Git em um banco de dados temporal com GitHub Actions
item.description: *1.A armadilha do Overengineering * Quando comecei a desenhar o Gado-Scraper, eu tinha um problema e uma restrição clara: eu precisava monitorar cotações pecuárias diariamente, mas, como...

item.title: The Headless CMS Pattern
item.description: WordPress powers 43% of the web. It is the most battle-tested content management system ever built. It also ships with a PHP frontend that is slow, bloated, and increasingly irrelevant. We use...

item.title: AI Tools Race Heats Up: Week of March 16 – April 2, 2026
item.description: The past two weeks brought a major hardware shakeup at Nvidia GTC, a pricing war across AI coding tools, and the first MCP Dev Summit. Here is what matters most for developers and data...

item.title: Apache Data Lakehouse Weekly: March 16 – April 2, 2026
item.description: The past two and a half weeks have been defined by one looming event: the Iceberg Summit on April 8–9 in San Francisco. As the community counts down to its largest-ever gathering, the dev lists...

item.title: AO3 is finally out of beta after 17 years
item.description: Archive of Our Own (AO3) is officially exiting beta. The Organization for Transformative Works - the nonprofit behind the fanfiction site - announced the update on Thursday, which comes 17 years...

item.title: PSA: Anyone with a link can view your Granola notes by default
item.description: If you use the AI-powered note-taking app Granola, you might want to double-check your privacy settings. Though Granola says your notes are "private by default," it makes them viewable to anyone...

item.title: Reddit is moving on from r/all
item.description: Reddit is deprecating r/all, one of its feeds that shows popular posts on the platform, as part of "ongoing efforts to simplify Reddit and improve Home feed personalization." Reddit has offered...

item.title: The best AirPods deals you can get right now
item.description: If you know where to look, you can often score deals on Apple’s ever-expanding AirPods lineup. Both the AirPods Pro 3 and the AirPods 4 (with and without ANC) now consistently receive discounts,...

item.title: ‘Uncanny Valley’: Iran’s Threats on US Tech, Trump’s Plans for Midterms, and Polymarket’s Pop-up Flop
item.description: In this episode, we discuss Iran’s threats to target US tech firms, gear up for the midterm elections, and get a scene report from the Polymarket pop-up bar in DC.

item.title: This bike rack pioneer is selling Bluetooth suction cups to stick bikes to your car
item.description: Richard Allen didn't invent the automobile bike rack - his 1967 patent application makes it clear that others came before. But after nearly sixty years selling popular and simple mechanical bike...

item.title: The ABS Challenge System is exposing the worst umpire in baseball
item.description: During Wednesday's game between the Tampa Bay Rays and the Milwaukee Brewers, umpire CB Bucknor took a foul ball to the mask and had to be helped off the field. It was the cap to what has been a...

item.title: Hackers Exploit CVE-2025-55182 to Breach 766 Next.js Hosts, Steal Credentials
item.description: A large-scale credential harvesting operation has been observed exploiting the React2Shell vulnerability as an initial infection vector to steal database credentials, SSH private keys, Amazon Web...

item.title: OpenAI Acquires Tech Talk Show ‘TBPN’—and Buys Itself Some Positive News
item.description: OpenAI is acquiring TBPN, a business talk show that’s popular among Silicon Valley elites, as it continues to battle its negative public image.

item.title: Pinterest said he violated laid-off colleagues’ privacy. Now he’s going public
item.description: It was late January, and Pinterest engineer Teddy Martin was on edge about recent layoffs at the company. Martin had just survived a round of cuts, but he and other employees were confused about...

item.title: OpenAI acquires TBPN, the buzzy founder-led business talk show
item.description: TBPN, Silicon Valley's cult-favorite tech podcast, will operate independently, even as it's overseen by chief political operative Chris Lehane.

item.title: Trump fires US attorney general Pam Bondi
item.description: Taking a break from calling Bruce Springsteen a boring loser on Thursday, Donald Trump followed that up with another Truth Social post saying "loyal friend" Pam Bondi will transition to a...

item.title: A New Google-Funded Data Center Will Be Powered by a Massive Gas Plant
item.description: Documents show that one of Google’s new data centers would be powered by a natural gas plant that emits millions of tons of emissions each year—an increasingly common trend in the industry.

item.title: Five questions for the guys who made a compass that points to the Times Square Olive Garden
item.description: Here's a question almost nobody is asking: how do you get to the Times Square Olive Garden? Well, these beautiful weirdos are answering it - the team that made the Times Square Olive Garden...

item.title: Elon Musk is about to be a very busy boy!
item.description: To be honest, I thought Elon Musk would confidentially file for SpaceX's IPO on the 20th of this month, rather than the 1st. But maybe that just means he's moved on to other numbers, and we should...

item.title: US Bans All Foreign-Made Consumer Routers
item.description: This is for new routers; you don’t have to throw away your existing ones: The Executive Branch determination noted that foreign-produced routers (1) introduce “a supply chain vulnerability that...

item.title: Cursor Launches a New AI Agent Experience to Take On Claude Code and Codex
item.description: As Cursor launches the next generation of its product, the AI coding startup has to compete with OpenAI and Anthropic more directly than ever.

item.title: Microsoft takes on AI rivals with three new foundational models
item.description: MAI released models that can transcribe voice into text as well as generate audio and images after the group's formation six months ago.

item.title: Google now lets you direct avatars through prompts in its Vids app
item.description: Google is adding a way to customize and instruct avatars for video creation in the Vids app.

item.title: Anthropic Says That Claude Contains Its Own Kind of Emotions
item.description: Researchers at the company found representations inside of Claude that perform functions similar to human feelings.
